stemHtml:
Given the following information, calculate the Contingency Fuel for the following Commercial Air Transport Flight with a Performance Class A aeroplane, assuming the Basic Fuel Scheme WITHOUT variations applies.

Trip Fuel: 4300 lb
Destination Alternate Fuel: 423 lb
En-route alternate: NOT applicable
Final Reserve Fuel: 570 lb
Fuel to fly for 5 minutes above destination: 115 lb
Extra Fuel: 0 lb
Discretionary Fuel: 0 lb
